name: design-system
description: Professional, minimalistic design system for dashboards, CMS, and admin interfaces.

alert.description: Inline feedback message with optional icon slot.

app-shell.import: import { AppShell, AppShellSidebar, AppShellMain, AppShellHeader, AppShellContent, AppShellSidebarTrigger } from 'design-system'
app-shell.description: Full-page admin layout. Wraps Sidebar + main content area. Includes SidebarProvider internally.

avatar.description: User avatar with image and initials fallback.

badge.description: Status pill for tags, states, and counts.

breadcrumb.import: import { Breadcrumb, BreadcrumbList, BreadcrumbItem, BreadcrumbLink, BreadcrumbPage, BreadcrumbSeparator, BreadcrumbEllipsis } from 'design-system'
breadcrumb.description: Navigation trail. BreadcrumbPage marks the current non-link page.

props.asChild: boolean — renders as child element via Radix Slot

button.description: Primary interactive element. Use `default` for one primary action per page.

card.import: import { Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter } from 'design-system'
card.description: Bordered surface for grouping related content.

checkbox.description: Accessible checkbox. Supports checked / unchecked / indeterminate.

command.import: import { Command, CommandInput, CommandList, CommandEmpty, CommandGroup, CommandItem, CommandSeparator, CommandShortcut } from 'design-system'
command.description: Command palette built on cmdk. Typically displayed inside a Dialog.

dialog.import: import { Dialog, DialogTrigger, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogFooter, DialogTitle, DialogDescription, DialogClose } from 'design-system'
dialog.description: Modal dialog. Use sparingly — prefer Sheet for side panels and inline editing for quick edits.

dropdown-menu.import: import { DropdownMenu, DropdownMenuTrigger, DropdownMenuContent, DropdownMenuItem, DropdownMenuSeparator, DropdownMenuLabel, DropdownMenuShortcut } from 'design-system'
dropdown-menu.description: Context menu / action menu. DropdownMenuItem accepts variant='destructive' for danger actions.

input.description: Text input. Set aria-invalid or data-invalid to trigger error styling.

label.description: Accessible label. Always pair with an input via htmlFor.

select.import: import { Select, SelectTrigger, SelectValue, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectGroup, SelectLabel, SelectSeparator } from 'design-system'

sheet.import: import { Sheet, SheetTrigger, SheetContent, SheetHeader, SheetTitle, SheetDescription, SheetFooter, SheetClose } from 'design-system'
sheet.description: Slide-in panel. Prefer over Dialog for filters, detail views, and mobile navigation.

sidebar.import: import { SidebarProvider, useSidebar, Sidebar, SidebarHeader, SidebarContent, SidebarFooter, SidebarNavSection, SidebarNavItem, SidebarTrigger, SidebarNav } from 'design-system'
sidebar.description: Collapsible navigation sidebar. SidebarNav accepts NavSection[] for data-driven nav. State is persisted to localStorage.

skeleton.description: Loading placeholder with shimmer animation. Set className to match the shape of content.

table.import: import { Table, TableHeader, TableBody, TableRow, TableHead, TableCell, TableFooter, TableCaption } from 'design-system'
table.description: Data table with responsive overflow scroll wrapper.

tooltip.import: import { TooltipProvider, Tooltip, TooltipTrigger, TooltipContent, SimpleTooltip } from 'design-system'
tooltip.description: Hover/focus tooltip. Use SimpleTooltip for one-liner convenience.
